# IAM3D – Medical Practice Management Platform

> An AI-enhanced medical practice management platform for doctors, patients, pharmacists, and researchers. Built for the Brazilian healthcare market with HL7 FHIR R4 compliance, multi-clinic support, and real-time video consultations.

## Public Pages

- [Home](https://tele.m3d.pro/): Landing page with platform overview and quick access.
- [Features](https://tele.m3d.pro/features): Detailed feature list covering AI diagnostics, video consultations, pharmacy integration, and more.
- [Documentation](https://tele.m3d.pro/documentation): Technical and user documentation for all roles.
- [Manual](https://tele.m3d.pro/manual): Step-by-step operational manual for healthcare professionals.
- [FAQ](https://tele.m3d.pro/faq): Frequently asked questions about the platform.
- [Register](https://tele.m3d.pro/register): Account registration for patients, doctors, pharmacists, and admins.
- [Login](https://tele.m3d.pro/login): Secure login for all user roles.

## Platform Summary

IAM3D is a comprehensive digital health platform designed to modernize clinical operations in Brazil. Key capabilities include:

- AI-powered symptom triage following Manchester Protocol / WHO ETAT guidelines
- Real-time video consultations via Agora with transcription and AI diagnostic assistance
- Structured digital medical records (PMD v1.0) compliant with CFM/LGPD/RGPD
- HL7 FHIR R4 compliant patient data export (JSON and PDF)
- Multi-clinic management with shared patient records and revenue sharing
- Integrated pharmacy module with prescription verification and dispensing
- AI-generated SOAP notes, prescriptions, referrals, and post-consultation reports
- Drug interaction analysis with RxNorm/OpenFDA/ANVISA database integration
- ECG and radiology AI analysis with triple-verification pipelines
- Unified payment checkout supporting Stripe, PayPal, and PagBank
- WhatsApp-based intelligent messaging for healthcare providers
- CRM and professional license verification via CFM and Ordem dos Médicos APIs
- Digital signature verification via ICP-Brasil A3

## Intended Audience

Healthcare professionals (doctors, pharmacists, clinic administrators), patients seeking digital health services, and medical researchers in Brazil and Portuguese-speaking markets.

## Legal & Compliance

This platform processes sensitive health information under Brazilian LGPD and European RGPD frameworks. Medical AI outputs follow OMS, Ministério da Saúde/Brasil, DSM-5, and DSM-5-TR guidelines.
